title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 10.  UNIFORM EMERGENCY VOLUNTEER

HEALTH PRACTITIONERS ACT

§781.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Uniform Emergency Volunteer Health Practitioners Act".

Acts 2009, No. 397, §1.
